paper_step8_requirements.a_recursive_state_update: PARTIAL — OaK Q-function updates recursively; no explicit LSTM/GRU hidden state
paper_step8_requirements.c_feature_finding_with_importance_feedba: TRUE (approx) — feature_to_subtask_specs() extracts top-k features from OaK Q-weight importance
paper_step8_requirements.d_feature_ranking_for_model_inclusion: TRUE (approx) — Q-weight importance ranks observation dimensions; SubtaskSpec creation uses this ranking
paper_step8_requirements.e_model_planning_feature_ranking_cycling: TRUE (approx) — OaK curation adds/removes options based on utility; Guarded Dreamer uses model; feature_to_subtask_specs feeds feature importance back into option creation
paper_step8_requirements.f_search_control: TRUE (approx) — GuardedDreamer controls when to use the model (error-gated acceptance)

prototype_agent_integration.note: PrototypeAgent integrates all major Step 8 components. The feature_to_subtask_specs() function implements steps 8c/8d: it extracts feature importance from OaK Q-weights and creates subtask specs targeting high-importance features. The OaK curation cycle (option utility tracking + spec updates) implements step 8e. GuardedDreamer implements step 8f.

open_boundaries: Explicit recursive hidden state (LSTM/GRU) not implemented — OaK's Q-function updates recursively but no explicit hidden state vector
Feature ranking is based on Q-weight importance, not on model prediction error (paper envisions model feedback loop)
The model-feature cycling is approximate: features → subtask specs, but model errors don't feed back to feature discovery
No benchmark evidence showing integrated PrototypeAgent outperforms component-level algorithms
note: Step 8 update (2026-05-21): The PrototypeAgent (v0.21.0) IS the paper's Prototype-AI I as an integrated agent with 5/6 sub-components. The step8.py facade is one building block; the full integration lives in PrototypeAgent. The previous solution gate said '1/6 sub-components' based on step8.py alone, but the PrototypeAgent provides world model + feature importance extraction + option curation + guarded planning + Horde prediction. Missing: explicit recursive hidden state and model-driven feature ranking.
